shellCommands.command:
npx next dev --port 3999 &
sleep 5
curl -s http://localhost:3999 > /dev/null 2>&1
sleep 1
curl -s http://localhost:3999/does-not-exist > /dev/null 2>&1
sleep 2
# Kill the dev server
kill %1 2>/dev/null || true

npx next dev --port 3999 &
sleep 5
curl -s http://localhost:3999 > /dev/null 2>&1
curl -s http://localhost:3999/api/test > /dev/null 2>&1
sleep 2
kill %1 2>/dev/null || true

npx next dev --port 3999 &
sleep 5
echo "--- Request 1: / ---"
curl -s http://localhost:3999 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo "--- Request 2: /nonexistent ---"
curl -s http://localhost:3999/nonexistent > /dev/null 2>&1
sleep 2
kill %1 2>/dev/null || true
